Color Analysis Summary

Your Ideal Color Palette

Based on your warm autumn coloring with golden-brown skin undertones and dark features, you look exceptional in warm, earthy tones. Your natural coloring has a rich, warm quality that is beautifully enhanced by colors with golden, orange, and bronze undertones.

The earthy tones you were wearing in your photos—particularly the dusty rose t-shirt and olive bomber jacket—are perfect examples of colors that complement your natural warmth.

Avoid: Cool-toned colors like icy pastels, stark black, bright white, and cool purples.

Styling Guidelines

Quick Tips for Maximum Impact

  • ✓
    Build Your Base: Start with neutrals like cream, camel, olive, chocolate
  • ✓
    Add Personality: Layer in terracotta, rust, mustard, moss green
  • ✓
    Statement Pieces: Use jewel tones for special occasions
  • ✓
    Jewelry: Choose gold, bronze, copper over silver
  • ✓
    Color Combinations: Cream + terracotta + teal, olive + rust + taupe
